metadata.name: Precious Metals Trading Platform
metadata.description: Manifest for a precious metals trading platform. Demonstrates event-triggered sagas using the event: trigger type with CEL filters. Sagas fire automatically when positions are captured or parties are created — no API call required from the publisher. Full saga scripts are maintained in services/control-plane/internal/applier/testdata/tenant-saga-examples/

sagas.name: valuation_on_capture
kyc_on_party
